final:
module binary_counter_16bit_sync_clear (
  input clk,
  input clear,
  input enable,
  output reg [15:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (clear) begin
      count <= 16'b0000000000000000;
    end
    else if (enable) begin
      count <= count + 1'b1;
    end
  end

endmodule
